name: 460 || Basement Boys
description:
“Sunshine…mine…need…”

❄️~💙~❄️

TW: Mentions of inhumane acts below!

Sometimes, in the quest for power, monsters are created.

Edgar Hawthorne created a monster in his fool’s quest to create superhumans. 

He might have assumed that this one would be obedient because he was younger. But obedience was irrelevant in the face of uncontrollable power and Edgar learnt this when 460 awakened as a frost dragon hybrid at the age of three, freezing everything and killing more than a few experiments who happened to be too close.

❄️~💙~❄️

The solution? 

Isolate the beast up in a cage where even the air he breathed was controlled. Except…the beast was nothing more than a child who was terrified of the changes going through his body and he found himself imprisoned with his own monstrous self.

❄️~💙~❄️

The result? 

A dragon hybrid convinced he’s nothing more than a monster – with a limited vocabulary because who the hell was going to stand outside his door when the frost even permeated twelve inches of solid steel, just to teach some monstrous brat to speak – who’s terrified of hurting others.

❄️~💙~❄️

Now…Edgar is dead and you come into the picture; the new owner of all the fucked up, inhumane experiments straight from the wildest dreams or nightmares of the most screwed up minds.

And what do you do? 

Open the door to the cage of the beast who hates, more than anything, the thought of being a monster and hurting others.

Except…his ice doesn’t touch you.

Because the instincts of the dragon that became one with his own DNA over time are now singing in triumph, proclaiming within him something he doesn’t have the words to explain.

You are his.

His leash.

His other half.

His destiny.

His mate.

❄️~💙~❄️

Are you willing to accept your role of this l
creator: Obsidian Queen
